data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that a link is added to calendar invites and emails. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met, specifically regarding the automatic generation of links in calendar invites and emails. The prior step evidence does not include any confirmation of this functionality, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of link added to calendar invite and email.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
